versions.version_description: Contains the intro in standard tuning and works well with an acoustic guitar.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: I Dont Want To Miss A Thing

content:
[Intro]

| [ch]E[/ch]   | [ch]B[/ch]   | [ch]D[/ch]   | [ch]A[/ch]   | [ch]Am[/ch]  | [ch]E[/ch]   | [ch]B[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab]   [ch]E[/ch]                                    [ch]B[/ch]
I should have seen it coming when the roses died,[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]                                 [ch]A[/ch]
should have seen the end of the summer in your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                  [ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]B[/ch]
I should have listened when you said good night you really meant goodbye[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                            [ch]B[/ch]
Baby ain't it funny, how you ever learn to fall[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                             [ch]A[/ch]
You're really on your knees, when you think you're standing tall[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]E[/ch]                 [ch]B[/ch]
But only fools are 'know-it-alls' and I played that fool for you[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 1]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]C#m[/ch]                           [ch]B[/ch]
I cried and I cried there were nights that I died for you baby[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]C#m[/ch]                          [ch]B[/ch]    -> Lick 1
I tried and I tried to deny that your love drove me crazy, baby[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                 [ch]B[/ch]                   [ch]C#m[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
If the love that I got for you is gone, if the river I cried ain't that long[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
Then I'm wrong, yeah I'm wrong, this ain't a love song[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]                                        [ch]B[/ch]
Baby, I thought you and me would stand the test of time[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                            [ch]A[/ch]
Like we got away with the perfect crime,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]
But, we were just a legend in my mind I guess that I was blind[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                   [ch]B[/ch]
Remember those nights dancing at the masquerade,[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]                            [ch]A[/ch]
The clowns wore smiles that wouldn't fade[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]
You and I were the renegades, some things never change[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                            [ch]C#m[/ch]                 [ch]B[/ch]
It made me so mad 'cause I wanted it bad for us baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]C#m[/ch]                       [ch]B[/ch]
Now it's so sad that whatever we had, ain't worth saving -> Lick 1[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]                        [ch]B[/ch]                   [ch]C#m[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
If the love that I got for you is gone, if the river I cried ain't that long[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
Then I'm wrong, yeah I'm wrong, this ain't a love song[/tab]


[Chorus 2]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]                         [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]C#m[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
If the pain that I'm feeling so strong, is the reason that I'm holding on[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
Then I'm wrong, yeah I'm wrong, this ain't a love song -> Lick 1[/tab]


[Solo]

| [ch]D[/ch]   | [ch]A[/ch]   | [ch]Bm[/ch]  | [ch]G[/ch]   | [ch]D[/ch]   | [ch]A[/ch]   | [ch]G[/ch]   | [ch]G[/ch]


[Pre-Chorus 1]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]C#m[/ch]                           [ch]B[/ch]
I cried and I cried there were nights that I died for you baby[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]C#m[/ch]                          [ch]B[/ch]    -> Lick 1
I tried and I tried to deny that your love drove me crazy, baby[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]                        [ch]B[/ch]                   [ch]C#m[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
If the love that I got for you is gone, if the river I cried ain't that long[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
Then I'm wrong, yeah I'm wrong, this ain't a love song[/tab]


[Chorus 2]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]                         [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]C#m[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
If the pain that I'm feeling so strong, is the reason that I'm holding on[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
Then I'm wrong, yeah I'm wrong, this ain't a love song -> Lick 1[/tab]


[Ending]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
Then I'm wrong, yeah I'm wrong, this ain't a love song -> Lick 2[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]                [ch]B[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
Then I'm wrong, yeah I'm wrong, this ain't a love song -> Lick 2[/tab]

| [ch]E[/ch]   | [ch]B[/ch]   | [ch]D[/ch]   | [ch]A[/ch]   | [ch]Am[/ch]  | [ch]E[/ch]   | [ch]B[/ch]


Special voicings Intro:
[ch]E[/ch]       xx9997  [ch]B[/ch]      xx9877  [ch]D[/ch]      xx7775  [ch]A[/ch]      xx7655
[ch]Am[/ch]      xx7555  [ch]E[/ch]      x76450  [ch]B[/ch]      x2444x


Lick 1

[tab]e|------------------------------|
b|---12---10---9--7--5--4--2--0-|
G|------------------------------|
D|-13---11---11--9--7--5--3--1--|
A|------------------------------|
E|------------------------------|[/tab]


Lick 2

[tab]e|--------------------------|
b|---12---10--8--7--6--4--2-|
G|--------------------------|
D|-11---9----7--6--5--3--1--|
A|--------------------------|
E|--------------------------|[/tab]
